value.found_quote: Claude Security        | ✅ Supported     | Available in public beta for Enterprise plans at [claude.ai/security](https://claude.ai/security)
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists "Claude Security" as a supported feature in the feature table, noting it is "Available in public beta for Enterprise plans at claude.ai/security." This directly substantiates the claim that Anthropic offers Claude Security as a security feature for Enterprise plans hosted at claude.ai/security. The page also references Claude Security multiple times in the admin setup section. However, the claim states it is generally available for Enterprise plans, while the page specifies it is in "public beta," making the lifecycle status 'beta' rather than 'active'.
